framework: A path qualifies only when >=3 prominent, proven people in the field visibly share the capability, each with a resolving link — the pattern across standouts is the evidence, not market demand. Ranked by strength of that pattern. Curated editorial, not DOL-derived.

paths.what_it_is: Mastering advanced Boolean and X-ray search strings, deep-web candidate research, and passive-candidate sourcing methodology to surface talent that standard keyword search misses.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can find candidates a routine keyword search misses — a high-leverage technical skill that turns sourcing from a checklist into an edge.

paths.what_it_is: Building rigorous people-analytics research, workforce measurement frameworks, and data storytelling that turn HR data into decisions executives actually act on.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can translate workforce data into decisions executives actually act on — evidence HR expertise doesn't have to stay a back-office reporting function.

paths.what_it_is: Designing structured frameworks and assessment tools that embed fairness and equity directly into hiring, promotion, and organizational processes, rather than relying on one-off training sessions.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can embed fairness into a system's structure rather than patch it with a one-off training — a transferable, systems-level capability employers seek out by name.
